message:
feat(ffs-mvcc): implement MVCC-aware block device wrapper (bd-19k)

Adds MvccBlockDevice<D: BlockDevice> that provides snapshot-isolated
reads (checking the version store before falling back to the base
device) and write-through staging via single-block transactions.
Includes tests for base fallback, write visibility, snapshot isolation,
and delegation of block_size/block_count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
